positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~location(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    location(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~location(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~visited(juan_de_onate,X0) | ~location(X0,texas) | ~mountain_range(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    mine(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    mountain_range(picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    visited(juan_de_onate,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
